name: @intentsolutionsio/database-migration-manager
description: Manage database migrations with version control, rollback capabilities, and automated schema evolution tracking

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install database-migration-manager\\n  or /plugin install database-migration-manager@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
